findings.description: s3 titled "入力データの復元" merges three distinct source sections: "入力データの復元" (===== level), "入力項目の確認画面用の出力" (===== level, same hierarchy), and "textタグの出力例" (------- sub-section). The two ===== sections are at the same structural level as the other knowledge file top-level sections (s1/s2), so they should each be separate sections. The merged content well exceeds 2000 chars and includes h3-level sub-sections. The section title does not reflect the confirmation page output content, and "入力項目の確認画面用の出力" has no entry in the index.
findings.source_evidence: Source has separate headings: "入力データの復元" with =====, "入力項目の確認画面用の出力" with ===== (same level), and "textタグの出力例" with ------- (sub-section under the latter). These are all merged into s3.

findings.description: s5 hints are missing `elementLabelProperty` and `elementValueProperty`, which are key attribute names explicitly demonstrated in the select tag JSP code example.
findings.source_evidence: Source JSP example: `listName="allUseCase" elementLabelProperty="useCaseName" elementValueProperty="useCaseId" elementLabelPattern="${VALUE}:${LABEL}"`
